translations.A message with a link to the meeting not: A message with a link to the meeting notes will be posted in the Talk room asking team members to add agenda items.
translations.Activity from files, calendar, tasks and: Activity from files, calendar, tasks and team changes will appear here
translations.Add all members of a Nextcloud group at: Add all members of a Nextcloud group at once
translations.Add more context to your poll…: Add more context to your poll…
translations.All team membership caches are populated: All team membership caches are populated and consistent.
translations.All user-created teams on this Nextcloud: All user-created teams on this Nextcloud instance. You can assign a new owner or delete any team.
translations.Any member can invite other users to joi: Any member can invite other users to join this team.
translations.Anyone can join this team without an inv: Anyone can join this team without an invitation.
translations.Are you sure you want to delete this mes: Are you sure you want to delete this message?
translations.Are you sure you want to make {name} the: Are you sure you want to make {name} the new owner of this team? You will be demoted to admin.
translations.Assign a new owner from the current team: Assign a new owner from the current team members. The new owner will receive full ownership rights. You will be demoted to admin.
translations.Attach file — uploads to your Files and: Attach file — uploads to your Files and inserts a link
translations.Audit rows older than this are automatic: Audit rows older than this are automatically purged. Allowed range: {min}–{max} days.
translations.Be the first to post a message: Be the first to post a message
translations.Cannot create page: team name not availa: Cannot create page: team name not available
translations.Checks that each team\\'s membership cac: Checks that each team\'s membership cache (circles_membership) is populated. A stale/empty cache means users added via groups or other teams won\'t appear in share pickers for Files, Calendar, Deck, etc. Run Repair to rebuild the cache.
translations.Choose which types of accounts team admi: Choose which types of accounts team admins can invite to a team.
translations.Close this poll? No more votes will be a: Close this poll? No more votes will be accepted.
translations.Configure how people can join and intera: Configure how people can join and interact with this team.
translations.Create a group conversation for this tea: Create a group conversation for this team
translations.Create a shared calendar for this team: Create a shared calendar for this team
translations.Create a shared folder for this team: Create a shared folder for this team
translations.Create a task board for this team: Create a task board for this team
translations.Creates meeting notes, a calendar event: Creates meeting notes, a calendar event and links your team Talk room.
translations.Delete \"{name}\" and all its data? This: Delete "{name}" and all its data? This cannot be undone.
translations.Disabling {name} will permanently delete: Disabling {name} will permanently delete all data associated with this team:
translations.Discover and join teams in your organiza: Discover and join teams in your organization
translations.Drag widgets to rearrange. Use the resiz: Drag widgets to rearrange. Use the resize icon in the bottom-right corner of each widget to resize.
translations.Enable or disable Nextcloud apps for thi: Enable or disable Nextcloud apps for this team. Disabled apps are hidden from the tab bar.
translations.Enable or disable third-party integratio: Enable or disable third-party integrations registered by other Nextcloud apps. Widgets appear on the Home view. Tab integrations add a tab to the tab bar.
translations.End time must be after start time: End time must be after start time
translations.Enforce password on files shared with th: Enforce password on files shared with this team
translations.Enforce password protection on files sha: Enforce password protection on files shared with this team
translations.Enter a title for the new page: Enter a title for the new page
translations.Existing members can invite new people: Existing members can invite new people
translations.External activity (member, file, and sha: External activity (member, file, and share events) is mirrored from Nextcloud once per hour by a background job. New events may take up to an hour to appear here. TeamHub-internal actions (team creation, join requests) are recorded immediately.
translations.Failed to mark question as solved: {erro: Failed to mark question as solved: {error}
translations.Files and folders shared with this team: Files and folders shared with this team
translations.Files shared with this team are protecte: Files shared with this team are protected by a password.
Image too large. Maximum size is 2 MB.
translations.Integrations registered by installed app: Integrations registered by installed apps via the TeamHub API. Registration and deregistration require NC admin access and are done via the REST API or the app\'s own settings.
translations.Invite external people by email (require: Invite external people by email (requires Circles federation)
translations.Invite people to join this team. You can: Invite people to join this team. You can also add members later.
translations.Invite users from other Nextcloud instan: Invite users from other Nextcloud instances (requires Circles federation)
translations.Join requests must be approved by a mode: Join requests must be approved by a moderator before membership is granted.
translations.Membership requests must be approved by: Membership requests must be approved by a Moderator (requires "Anyone can join")
translations.Minimum member role required to pin or u: Minimum member role required to pin or unpin a message. One message can be pinned per team at a time.
translations.No Talk room found — a new Talk chat wil: No Talk room found — a new Talk chat will be created for this meeting.
translations.No events recorded for the selected filt: No events recorded for the selected filters.
translations.No favourited files in this team folder: No favourited files in this team folder
translations.No files in this team folder yet: No files in this team folder yet
translations.No invitation needed — anyone can become: No invitation needed — anyone can become a member
translations.No stack found on this board. Please add: No stack found on this board. Please add a stack in Deck first.
translations.No sub-pages to delete. The main team pa: No sub-pages to delete. The main team page can only be removed by disabling the Pages app for this team.
No teams without an owner found.
translations.No third-party integrations available. I: No third-party integrations available. Install a compatible app to add integrations to this team.
translations.Not enabled by the team owner: Not enabled by the team owner
translations.Note: calendar event could not be create: Note: calendar event could not be created. Check that a team calendar is set up.
translations.Nothing shared with this team yet: Nothing shared with this team yet
translations.Only invited users can become members of: Only invited users can become members of this team.
translations.Only members of the selected groups can: Only members of the selected groups can create teams. Leave empty to allow all users.
translations.Per-team activity log capturing membersh: Per-team activity log capturing membership, file, and share events for governance and compliance.
translations.Permanently delete the team and all its: Permanently delete the team and all its settings. Resources (files, calendar, chat) are not deleted.
Please enter a valid email address.

translations.TeamHub can send anonymous usage data to: TeamHub can send anonymous usage data to help improve the app. No URLs, hostnames, or user data are ever included — only an anonymous UUID and aggregate counts.
translations.TeamHub will create a dedicated space in: TeamHub will create a dedicated space in each checked app and add the team as a member.
TeamHub will create a dedicated space in each selected app and add this team as a member.

translations.When IntraVox is enabled for a team, Tea: When IntraVox is enabled for a team, TeamHub creates a page at this path inside IntraVox. Use the format language/folder (e.g. en/teamhub or nl/teamhub). The folder must already exist in IntraVox.
